arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers names Celtic starting XI to play Rangers with huge midfield call
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has named his Celtic starting XI to face Rangers at Ibrox in today's Scottish Premiership encounter

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer drinks in Rangers vs Celtic as he proves a man of his word with trip to savour 'EPL pair'
arts.sum: He loves the idea of the Old Firm rivals in the EPL and while that won't happen - he's in Glasgow for the next best thing

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement's woes deepen as another key man ruled out to face Celtic amid injury setbacks
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers is preparing Celtic to face a Rangers side that have experienced their fair share of injury problems in the lead-up to today’s clash at Ibrox. James Tavernier will miss the Glasgow Derby due to injury, while Leon Balogun is deemed doubtful to take on Celtic after coming off against St Mirren on Boxing Day.

arts.ttl: 'Ibrox could get ugly': How Celtic can play major part in Philippe Clement's Rangers 'last dance' as Chris Sutton fires warning
arts.sum: Philippe Clement’s record vs Celtic as Rangers manager Matches played: 6 Wins: 0 Draws: 1 (Not including Premier Sports Cup Final) Defeats: 5 Goals scored: 8 Goals conceded: 14 Sutton says a Rangers loss to Celtic will be ‘curtains’ for Clement

arts.ttl: What Philippe Clement did to Neil Warnock while he was Aberdeen boss sways his support in Rangers vs Celtic game
arts.sum: But it was when he was Aberdeen boss, Neil Warnock shared what the Rangers manager did to him that has made him confess he ‘doesn’t like’ Clement and suggests his support in who he wants to win the derby may now be swayed. Celtic have had the upper hand over the Ibrox club in recent years as Brendan Rodgers looks to continue his unbeaten record against Rangers since returning to Paradise two summers ago.

arts.ttl: Rangers v Celtic LIVE: Scottish Premiership team news, line-ups and more today
arts.sum: The first Old Firm derby of 2025 sees Rangers trying to close a 14-point gap to their rivals at the top of the table

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton warns Philippe Clement 'this could get UGLY' as Rangers boss stares down his last Ibrox dance
arts.sum: Sutton reckons another derby defeat will see Rangers fans force the Belgian out of the Ibrox hot seat

arts.ttl: Vaclav Cerny deludes himself ahead of Celtic's clash against Rangers with nonsense claim
arts.sum: On where he gets the belief from that Rangers can beat Celtic: “We all saw the last game, the cup final. Vaclav Cerny claims it’s ‘logical’ to think that Rangers can beat Celtic

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Celtic: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: 2025 kicks off with a bang in the Scottish Premiership as Rangers host Celtic in the Old Firm derby. Celtic are 14 points clear of their eternal rivals at the summit with Thursday's hosts enduring an underwhelming campaign with Belgian Philippe Clement at the helm.

arts.ttl: Dermot Desmond's favourite Celtic transfer revealed despite initial doubts and 'battle' over signing
arts.sum: The Hoops favourite had the time of his life in Glasgow but things could have been much different
